name: Grace Williams

current_profile.summary: VP of Marketing with 20+ years experience. Strong strategy and leadership; comfortable interpreting analytics but not hands-on technical. Uses GenAI for brainstorming and review; oversees vendors implementing personalization and ad-tech optimization.
current_profile.ai_experience: Uses GenAI for brainstorming; oversees AI vendor implementations

learning_intent: Wants executive-level AI literacy to lead AI investments, ask better questions, and align AI projects with brand, ROI, and compliance.

target_jd.title: AI-Savvy Marketing Leader (Strategy + Governance)
requirements: Set marketing AI strategy: personalization, attribution, content automation, and measurement
Evaluate vendors and internal AI proposals; define success metrics and guardrails
Ensure privacy and responsible use in targeting and content generation
Coach teams on workflows and change management for AI adoption

expected_skill_gaps.description: Practical understanding of LLMs, limitations, data privacy, and bias in marketing contexts.
Workflow mapping for AI-enabled marketing operations; feedback loops for continuous improvement.
Policy to controls for marketing data; vendor risk review basics.
Evaluating new AI tools and building repeatable personal/team AI workflows.
Marketing-specific AI ethics for content generation.
